HelpCenter.category_getting_started_desc: System startup and basic configuration protocols.
HelpCenter.category_security_desc: Details on Anti-DPI, obfuscation, and zero-logs policies.
HelpCenter.category_troubleshooting_desc: Diagnostics for connection and tunneling errors.
HelpCenter.contact_desc: Unable to resolve your anomaly in the archives? Establish a direct secure comm channel with our operators.
HelpCenter.faq_billing_1_a: You can acquire additional Access Credits via the Billing terminal using supported crypto or fiat gateways.
HelpCenter.faq_billing_1_q: How do I increase my bandwidth quota?
HelpCenter.faq_billing_2_a: Refunds are processed strictly within the first 72 hours of establishing a new connection cycle.
HelpCenter.faq_billing_2_q: Are refunds available for inactive cycles?
HelpCenter.faq_billing_3_a: Affirmative. We accept Monero (XMR), USDT, and Bitcoin for completely untraceable transactions.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_1_a: Download the CyberVPN core module for your OS, authenticate with your Neural ID, and click 'Engage'.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_1_q: How do I initialize my first connection?
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_2_a: The network accepts connections from Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android clients via standard Xray/Sing-box protocols.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_3_a: Yes, depending on your Access Credit tier, you can link up to 10 concurrent neural pathways.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_3_q: Can I connect multiple devices simultaneously?
HelpCenter.faq_security_1_a: Negative. All databanks are volatile. We operate on a strict zero-knowledge architecture.
HelpCenter.faq_security_2_a: We utilize ChaCha20-Poly1305 and AES-256-GCM ciphers, providing military-grade cryptographic integrity.
HelpCenter.faq_security_3_a: Yes. If the secure tunnel drops, the client immediately terminates all external network adapters to prevent IP leaks.
HelpCenter.faq_security_3_q: Do you offer a Kill Switch?
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_1_a: Check your node's ping. If packet loss exceeds 5%, reroute to an alternate shard in the Server Grid.
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_1_q: Why is my connection speed degraded?
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_2_a: The system automatically engages fallback routing. If manual override is needed, flush your DNS cache and reconnect.
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_2_q: What if the primary proxy fails?
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_3_a: Our core utilizing VLESS+Reality automatically masks your traffic as standard HTTPS. Ensure you have the latest core update applied.
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_3_q: How do I bypass DPI restrictions?
HelpCenter.meta_description: Access the databanks for troubleshooting, guides, and secure communication channels.

faq.a1: Negative. We operate on a strict Zero-Log infrastructure. Your digital footprint is erased upon disconnection.
faq.a2: Your connection will drop to baseline throttled speeds (128 kbps). Upgrade to Pro for unlimited transmission.
faq.a3: Affirmative. We accept Bitcoin, Monero, and secure digital credits. Absolute anonymity is our prime directive.
faq.q2: What happens if I exceed the Stealth tier bandwidth?

meta.description: CyberVPN's privacy policy covering data collection, no-log policy, GDPR rights, and data security practices.
meta.title: Privacy Policy - CyberVPN

changes.description: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date.
changes.title: Changes to This Policy

contact.intro: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us:
contact.title: Contact Information

dataCollection.intro: CyberVPN collects minimal data necessary to provide our VPN service:

items.deviceInfo: Device and connection metadata (device type, operating system)
items.paymentInfo: Payment information (processed securely by third-party providers)
items.usageStats: Aggregate usage statistics (bandwidth usage, connection duration)

dataCollection.title: Data Collection

dataRetention.description: We retain data only as long as necessary:

policies.accountData: Account data: retained while your account is active
policies.deletedAccounts: Deleted account data: permanently erased within 30 days
policies.paymentRecords: Payment records: 7 years for legal compliance
policies.supportLogs: Support logs: 90 days after ticket closure

dataRetention.title: Data Retention

measures.encryption: End-to-end encryption for all VPN traffic
measures.regularAudits: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments

gdprRights.intro: If you are in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:

access.description: Request a copy of your personal data
access.title: Right to Access

erasure.description: Request deletion of your personal data
erasure.title: Right to Erasure

objection.description: Object to processing of your data
objection.title: Right to Object

portability.description: Receive your data in a machine-readable format
portability.title: Right to Data Portability

gdprRights.title: Your GDPR Rights

notLogged.browsing: No browsing history or website visits
notLogged.connections: No connection timestamps or session duration
notLogged.dns: No DNS queries or IP addresses
notLogged.traffic: No traffic data or content inspection

noLogPolicy.statement: CyberVPN operates a strict no-log policy. We do NOT collect, store, or log your online activity.
noLogPolicy.title: No-Log Policy

thirdParty.description: We work with trusted third-party providers:
thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
